title: Mob HeadSteal SMP
description: Collect player heads on kill and unlock powerful abilities using custom mob heads in intense PvP combat.
body:
🧠 HeadSteal – Power Grows With Every Kill

HeadSteal is a PvP-focused Minecraft plugin inspired by the 1 Player Steals 1 Head concept.
Each time a player kills another player, they steal a head — increasing their maximum health and unlocking powerful custom head abilities.

Every kill makes you stronger… but death still has consequences.

⚔️ Features

🔪 Steal hearts on kill – Gain extra maximum health when you kill another player

💀 Lose hearts on death – Dying makes you weaker

🧠 Custom Mob Heads with Abilities

Unique mob heads drop with special powers

Equip or use them to gain temporary or passive abilities :

🎭 Ability-based gameplay – Mix different heads for different playstyles

⚙️ Fully configurable – Hearts, abilities, drop rates, limits, and more

🌍 Perfect for SMP & PvP servers

🚀 Lightweight & optimized

📦 How It Works :

Kill a player → Gain its head

Collect custom mob heads → Unlock special abilities

Die → Ban until some place your head

Stronger players become high-value targets

🧟 Custom Head Abilities (Examples) :

(Examples — customizable or expandable)

🧟 Zombie Head – Extra strength or lifesteal

🕷️ Spider Head – Speed or wall-climbing effects

💀 Wither Skeleton Head – Increased damage or wither effects

👑 Rare heads grant powerful but balanced abilities

🛠️ Configuration :

Max hearts limit

Hearts gained per kill / lost on death

Custom head drop chances

Ability strength & duration

World-specific settings

🎮 Recommended For :

Lifesteal SMPs

Hardcore & competitive servers

Ability-based PvP game modes
